name: Where Food Comes From, Inc.
summary: Where Food Comes From, Inc. (WFCF) is a leading third-party verification provider for food production practices in North America, supporting approximately 17,500 farmers, ranchers, processors, retailers, and restaurants. The company conducts on-site and desk audits to verify claims such as gluten-free, non-GMO, non-hormone treated, and humane handling across beef, lamb, pork, poultry, fish, dairy, eggs, produce, nuts, grains, and wine. It also offers professional consulting services and a Source Verified retail labeling program connecting consumers to food sources.
